subcodes.first_line: O servant! Thy letter hath arrived and been presented by this servant who standeth before His face, whom sorrows have encompassed by reason of that which hath been wrought [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا غلام قد حضر کتابک و عرضه العبد الحاضر تلقاء وجه احاطته الاحزان بما اکتسبت
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement
